title: LumiKids Alphabet
prompt:
Playful 2D illustration for a kids alphabet learning card, cheerful letters A B C with friendly eyes, crayons and soft shapes, pastel palette, premium children's education style, clean composition, no text beyond decorative letters

Avoid: photorealistic, scary, cluttered, watermark, logo, words, dark mood
